user_query:
I exported a snapshot of our OpenCode sessions/messages/projects into JSONL under input/. Please do the following and save all results under output/:

1) Read input/session.jsonl, input/project.jsonl, and input/params.json. Filter sessions where:
- session.directory starts with params.directory_prefix
- session.time_updated is between params.since_ms and params.until_ms (inclusive)

Join the filtered sessions with projects on session.project_id = project.id to pull project name and worktree. Sort by session.time_updated descending. Then write a CSV report to output/sessions_report.csv with exactly this header and column order:

id,title,project_name,worktree,updated_utc,summary_files,summary_additions,summary_deletions

Rules:
- Treat all time_* fields as millisecond Unix timestamps and convert updated_utc as an ISO 8601 UTC timestamp in the form YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ (no fractional seconds).
- project_name comes from the project name field; worktree from the project worktree field.
- Include only the filtered sessions.

2) Determine the most recently updated session among those filtered in step (1). Using that session's id, read input/message.jsonl and select only messages with message.session_id equal to that id. For each selected message, parse message.data (it is a JSON-encoded string) and extract:
- role (data.role)
- modelID (data.modelID)
- content_length: If data.parts is a non-empty array, sum the lengths of the "text" field across all items where item.type == "text"; if data.parts is missing or empty, and data.content is present, use the length of data.content; if neither applies, use 0.
- created_utc: Convert message.time_created (ms) to ISO 8601 UTC (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ).

Write these per-message summaries, in ascending order by message.time_created, as JSON Lines to output/messages_<SESSION_ID>.jsonl, where <SESSION_ID> is the chosen session id from step (2). Each line should be a JSON object with exactly these keys: id, created_utc, role, modelID, content_length.

Input files to read:
- input/session.jsonl
- input/project.jsonl
- input/message.jsonl
- input/params.json

Please ensure both files exist with the exact filenames and formats specified.
